violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in kitchen ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (mixer and prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors throughout the kitchen and mop sink area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The (floors ) in the (walk in cooler ) area is in poor repair.Observed floor tiles damaged and detaching from surface. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
